AI.tldr: 提出一种名为HMNS的越狱攻击方法，通过电路级干预绕过大语言模型的安全机制，实现受控模型操纵
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在安全对齐和指令调优方面有所进步，但仍容易受到越狱攻击，需要开发更有效的攻击方法来揭示模型漏洞
AI.method: HMNS方法：1)识别对模型默认行为因果影响最大的注意力头；2)通过目标列掩码抑制其写入路径；3)在抑制子空间的正交补空间中注入扰动；采用闭环检测-干预循环，在多轮解码中重新识别因果头并重新应用干预
AI.result: 在多个越狱基准测试、强安全防御和广泛使用的语言模型上，HMNS实现了最先进的攻击成功率，且查询次数少于先前方法；消融实验证实零空间约束注入、残差范数缩放和迭代重新识别是其有效性的关键
AI.conclusion: 这是第一个利用几何感知、可解释性指导干预的越狱方法，为受控模型操纵和对抗性安全规避开辟了新范式

authors: et al. (28 additional authors not shown)
title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Single Image Reflection Removal in the Wild: Datasets, Results, and Methods
summary: In this paper, we review the NTIRE 2026 challenge on single-image reflection removal (SIRR) in the Wild. SIRR is a fundamental task in image restoration. Despite progress in academic research, most methods are tested on synthetic images or limited real-world images, creating a gap in real-world applications. In this challenge, we provide participants with the OpenRR-5k dataset, which requires them to process real-world images that cover a range of reflection scenarios and intensities, with the goal of generating clean images without reflections. The challenge attracted more than 100 registrations, with 11 of them participating in the final testing phase. The top-ranked methods advanced the state-of-the-art reflection removal performance and earned unanimous recognition from the five experts in the field. The proposed OpenRR-5k dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/qiuzhangTiTi/OpenRR-5k, and the homepage of this challenge is at https://github.com/caijie0620/OpenRR-5k. Due to page limitations, this article only presents partial content; the full report and detailed analyses are available in the extended arXiv version.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了NTIRE 2026单图像反射去除挑战赛，该挑战旨在解决真实世界图像中的反射去除问题，并引入了OpenRR-5k数据集来评估算法性能。
AI.motivation: 单图像反射去除是图像恢复的基本任务，但现有方法大多在合成图像或有限真实图像上测试，与实际应用存在差距，需要更真实的数据集和评估。
AI.method: 通过组织挑战赛，提供OpenRR-5k真实世界反射数据集，涵盖多种反射场景和强度，要求参与者开发算法去除反射并生成干净图像。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了100多个注册，11个团队进入最终测试阶段，排名靠前的方法显著提升了反射去除性能，获得五位领域专家的一致认可。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026挑战赛成功推动了单图像反射去除技术的发展，OpenRR-5k数据集填补了真实世界评估的空白，促进了该领域的实际应用。

title: On the Approximability of Max-Cut on 3-Colorable Graphs and Graphs with Large Independent Sets
comment: 56 Pages. Abstract is shortened to fit arXiv requirements
summary: Max-Cut is a classical graph-partitioning problem where given a graph $G = (V,E)$, the objective is to find a cut $(S,S^c)$ which maximizes the number of edges crossing the cut. In a seminal work, Goemans and Williamson gave an $α_{GW} \approx 0.87856$-factor approximation algorithm for the problem, which was later shown to be tight by the work of Khot, Kindler, Mossel, and O'Donnell. Since then, there has been a steady progress in understanding the approximability at even finer levels, and a fundamental goal in this context is to understand how the structure of the underlying graph affects the approximability of the Max-Cut problem. In this work, we investigate this question by exploring how the chromatic structure of a graph affects the Max-Cut problem. While it is well-known that Max-Cut can be solved perfectly and near-perfectly in $2$-colorable and almost $2$-colorable graphs in polynomial time, here we explore its approximability under much weaker structural conditions such as when the graph is $3$-colorable or contains a large independent set. Our main contributions in this context are as follows: 1. We show Max-Cut is $α_{GW}$-hard to approximate for $3$-colorable graphs. 2. We identify a natural threshold $α^*$ such that the following holds. Firstly, for graphs which contain an independent set of size up to $α^*$, Max-Cut continues to be $α_{GW}$-factor hard to approximate. Furthermore, for any graph that contains an independent set of size $> α^*$, there exists an efficient $>α_{GW}$-approximation algorithm for Max-Cut. Our hardness results are derived using various analytical tools and novel variants of the Majority-Is-Stablest theorem, which might be of independent interest. Our algorithmic results are based on a novel SDP relaxation, which is then rounded and analyzed using interval arithmetic.

AI.tldr: 研究Max-Cut问题在特定图结构下的近似性，特别是3-可着色图和具有大独立集的图
AI.motivation: 探索底层图的结构如何影响Max-Cut问题的近似性，特别是图的着色结构对问题难度的影响
AI.method: 使用分析工具和Majority-Is-Stablest定理的新变体进行硬度证明，以及基于新型SDP松弛和区间算术的算法设计
AI.result: 证明Max-Cut在3-可着色图上具有α_GW硬度；识别出独立集大小的自然阈值α*，小于该阈值时保持α_GW硬度，大于该阈值时存在高效>α_GW近似算法
AI.conclusion: 图的着色结构显著影响Max-Cut的近似性，3-可着色图保持经典硬度，而足够大的独立集能实现超越经典界限的近似算法

title: ReFEree: Reference-Free and Fine-Grained Method for Evaluating Factual Consistency in Real-World Code Summarization
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) have become capable of generating long and descriptive code summaries, accurate and reliable evaluation of factual consistency has become a critical challenge. However, previous evaluation methods are primarily designed for short summaries of isolated code snippets. Consequently, they struggle to provide fine-grained evaluation of multi-sentence functionalities and fail to accurately assess dependency context commonly found in real-world code summaries. To address this, we propose ReFEree, a reference-free and fine-grained method for evaluating factual consistency in real-world code summaries. We define factual inconsistency criteria specific to code summaries and evaluate them at the segment level using these criteria along with dependency information. These segment-level results are then aggregated into a fine-grained score. We construct a code summarization benchmark with human-annotated factual consistency labels. The evaluation results demonstrate that ReFEree achieves the highest correlation with human judgment among 13 baselines, improving 15-18% over the previous state-of-the-art. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/bsy99615/ReFEree.git.

AI.tldr: 提出ReFEree方法，用于评估现实世界代码摘要的事实一致性
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要针对短代码片段摘要，无法对多句子功能进行细粒度评估，也不能准确评估现实世界代码摘要中的依赖上下文
AI.method: 定义代码摘要特定的事实不一致标准，使用这些标准和依赖信息在片段级别进行评估，然后将片段级结果聚合成细粒度分数
AI.result: ReFEree在13个基线方法中与人类判断的相关性最高，比之前最先进方法提高了15-18%
AI.conclusion: ReFEree是一种有效的参考无关细粒度方法，能够准确评估现实世界代码摘要的事实一致性

title: From Perception to Planning: Evolving Ego-Centric Task-Oriented Spatiotemporal Reasoning via Curriculum Learning
summary: Modern vision-language models achieve strong performance in static perception, but remain limited in the complex spatiotemporal reasoning required for embodied, egocentric tasks. A major source of failure is their reliance on temporal priors learned from passive video data, which often leads to spatiotemporal hallucinations and poor generalization in dynamic environments. To address this, we present EgoTSR, a curriculum-based framework for learning task-oriented spatiotemporal reasoning. EgoTSR is built on the premise that embodied reasoning should evolve from explicit spatial understanding to internalized task-state assessment and finally to long-horizon planning. To support this paradigm, we construct EgoTSR-Data, a large-scale dataset comprising 46 million samples organized into three stages: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision, weakly supervised tagging, and long-horizon sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EgoTSR effectively eliminates chronological biases, achieving 92.4% accuracy on long-horizon logical reasoning tasks while maintaining high fine-grained perceptual precision, significantly outperforming existing open-source and closed-source state-of-the-art models.

AI.tldr: 提出EgoTSR框架，通过课程学习从感知到规划的渐进式自我中心时空推理，解决具身智能任务中的时空幻觉和泛化问题
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在静态感知表现良好，但在具身自我中心任务所需的复杂时空推理中存在局限性，主要问题是依赖被动视频数据学习的时间先验导致时空幻觉和动态环境泛化能力差
AI.method: 提出EgoTSR课程学习框架，基于从显式空间理解到内部任务状态评估再到长时程规划的渐进式学习范式，构建包含4600万样本的EgoTSR-Data数据集，分为思维链监督、弱监督标注和长时程序列三个阶段
AI.result: EgoTSR有效消除了时序偏差，在长时程逻辑推理任务上达到92.4%准确率，同时保持高细粒度感知精度，显著优于现有开源和闭源最先进模型
AI.conclusion: 课程学习方法能够有效提升具身自我中心任务的时空推理能力，从感知到规划的渐进式学习范式为解决复杂动态环境中的任务导向推理提供了有效途径

title: Data-Efficient Surgical Phase Segmentation in Small-Incision Cataract Surgery: A Controlled Study of Vision Foundation Models
summary: Surgical phase segmentation is central to computer-assisted surgery, yet robust models remain difficult to develop when labeled surgical videos are scarce. We study data-efficient phase segmentation for manual small-incision cataract surgery (SICS) through a controlled comparison of visual representations. To isolate representation quality, we pair each visual encoder with the same temporal model (MS-TCN++) under identical training and evaluation settings on SICS-155 (19 phases). We compare supervised encoders (ResNet-50, I3D) against large self-supervised foundation models (DINOv3, V-JEPA2), and use a cached-feature pipeline that decouples expensive visual encoding from lightweight temporal learning. Foundation-model features improve segmentation performance in this setup, with DINOv3 ViT-7B achieving the best overall results (83.4% accuracy, 87.0 edit score). We further examine cataract-domain transfer using unlabeled videos and lightweight adaptation, and analyze when it helps or hurts. Overall, the study indicates strong transferability of modern vision foundation models to surgical workflow understanding and provides practical guidance for low-label medical video settings. The project website is available at: https://sl2005.github.io/DataEfficient-sics-phase-seg/

AI.tldr: 研究在标签数据稀缺的小切口白内障手术中进行数据高效的手术阶段分割，通过对比视觉基础模型与监督编码器的性能。
AI.motivation: 手术阶段分割在计算机辅助手术中至关重要，但在标记手术视频稀缺时难以开发鲁棒模型。需要研究在低标签医疗视频设置下的数据高效分割方法。
AI.method: 采用控制比较方法，将不同视觉编码器（ResNet-50、I3D、DINOv3、V-JEPA2）与相同的时间模型（MS-TCN++）配对，在相同训练和评估设置下测试。使用缓存特征管道将昂贵的视觉编码与轻量级时间学习解耦。
AI.result: 基础模型特征在该设置中提高了分割性能，DINOv3 ViT-7B获得最佳整体结果（83.4%准确率，87.0编辑分数）。进一步研究了白内障领域迁移和轻量级适应的效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明现代视觉基础模型对手术工作流理解具有强可迁移性，为低标签医疗视频设置提供了实用指导。基础模型在数据稀缺情况下表现出色。

title: Agent Mentor: Framing Agent Knowledge through Semantic Trajectory Analysis
summary: AI agent development relies heavily on natural language prompting to define agents' tasks, knowledge, and goals. These prompts are interpreted by Large Language Models (LLMs), which govern agent behavior. Consequently, agentic performance is susceptible to variability arising from imprecise or ambiguous prompt formulations. Identifying and correcting such issues requires examining not only the agent's code, but also the internal system prompts generated throughout its execution lifecycle, as reflected in execution logs. In this work, we introduce an analytics pipeline implemented as part of the Agent Mentor open-source library that monitors and incrementally adapts the system prompts defining another agent's behavior. The pipeline improves performance by systematically injecting corrective instructions into the agent's knowledge. We describe its underlying mechanism, with particular emphasis on identifying semantic features associated with undesired behaviors and using them to derive corrective statements. We evaluate the proposed pipeline across three exemplar agent configurations and benchmark tasks using repeated execution runs to assess effectiveness. These experiments provide an initial exploration of automating such a mentoring pipeline within future agentic governance frameworks. Overall, the approach demonstrates consistent and measurable accuracy improvements across diverse configurations, particularly in settings dominated by specification ambiguity. For reproducibility, we released our code as open source under the Agent Mentor library.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent Mentor开源库，通过语义轨迹分析监控和调整AI代理的系统提示，以提升代理性能
AI.motivation: AI代理开发依赖自然语言提示定义任务、知识和目标，但提示表述不精确或模糊会导致代理性能不稳定，需要系统化方法来识别和纠正这些问题
AI.method: 开发Agent Mentor开源库，实现分析管道监控代理执行日志，识别与不良行为相关的语义特征，并系统性地向代理知识中注入纠正指令
AI.result: 在三个示例代理配置和基准任务上评估，通过重复执行运行验证有效性，在规范模糊性主导的设置中显示出一致且可测量的准确性改进
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效提升代理性能，特别是在规范模糊性场景下，为未来代理治理框架中的自动化指导管道提供了初步探索

title: FreeScale: Scaling 3D Scenes via Certainty-Aware Free-View Generation
summary: The development of generalizable Novel View Synthesis (NVS) models is critically limited by the scarcity of large-scale training data featuring diverse and precise camera trajectories. While real-world captures are photorealistic, they are typically sparse and discrete. Conversely, synthetic data scales but suffers from a domain gap and often lacks realistic semantics. We introduce FreeScale, a novel framework that leverages the power of scene reconstruction to transform limited real-world image sequences into a scalable source of high-quality training data. Our key insight is that an imperfect reconstructed scene serves as a rich geometric proxy, but naively sampling from it amplifies artifacts. To this end, we propose a certainty-aware free-view sampling strategy identifying novel viewpoints that are both semantically meaningful and minimally affected by reconstruction errors. We demonstrate FreeScale's effectiveness by scaling up the training of feedforward NVS models, achieving a notable gain of 2.7 dB in PSNR on challenging out-of-distribution benchmarks. Furthermore, we show that the generated data can actively enhance per-scene 3D Gaussian Splatting optimization, leading to consistent improvements across multiple datasets. Our work provides a practical and powerful data generation engine to overcome a fundamental bottleneck in 3D vision. Project page: https://mvp-ai-lab.github.io/FreeScale.

AI.tldr: 提出FreeScale框架，通过确定性感知的自由视角生成技术，将有限的真实世界图像序列转化为可扩展的高质量训练数据，用于提升新视角合成模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 新视角合成模型的发展受到大规模训练数据稀缺的限制，真实世界捕获数据稀疏且离散，合成数据存在领域差距且缺乏真实语义，需要一种方法将有限真实数据转化为可扩展的高质量训练源。
AI.method: 利用场景重建作为几何代理，提出确定性感知的自由视角采样策略，识别既具有语义意义又受重建误差影响最小的新视角，生成高质量训练数据。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的分布外基准测试中，PSNR提升了2.7 dB；生成的数据能有效增强每场景3D高斯溅射优化，在多个数据集上实现一致改进。
AI.conclusion: FreeScale提供了一个实用且强大的数据生成引擎，克服了3D视觉中的基本瓶颈，为可扩展的高质量训练数据生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: Thinking Fast, Thinking Wrong: Intuitiveness Modulates LLM Counterfactual Reasoning in Policy Evaluation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for causal and counterfactual reasoning, yet their reliability in real-world policy evaluation remains underexplored. We construct a benchmark of 40 empirical policy evaluation cases drawn from economics and social science, each grounded in peer-reviewed evidence and classified by intuitiveness -- whether the empirical finding aligns with (obvious), is unclear relative to (ambiguous), or contradicts (counter-intuitive) common prior expectations. We evaluate four frontier LLMs across five prompting strategies with 2,400 experimental trials and analyze the results using mixed-effects logistic regression. Our findings reveal three key results: (1) a chain-of-thought (CoT) paradox, where chain-of-thought prompting dramatically improves performance on obvious cases but this benefit is nearly eliminated on counter-intuitive ones (interaction OR = 0.053, $p < 0.001$); (2) intuitiveness as the dominant factor, explaining more variance than model choice or prompting strategy (ICC = 0.537); and (3) a knowledge-reasoning dissociation, where citation-based familiarity is unrelated to accuracy ($p = 0.53$), suggesting models possess relevant knowledge but fail to reason with it when findings contradict intuition. We frame these results through the lens of dual-process theory (System 1 vs. System 2) and argue that current LLMs' "slow thinking" may be little more than "slow talking" -- they produce the form of deliberative reasoning without the substance.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在政策评估中的反事实推理能力，特别关注直觉性对模型表现的影响
AI.motivation: 虽然LLMs越来越多地用于因果和反事实推理，但它们在真实世界政策评估中的可靠性尚未充分探索，需要研究直觉性如何影响模型推理能力
AI.method: 构建包含40个经济学和社会科学政策评估案例的基准，基于同行评审证据分类为直觉明显、模糊和反直觉三类，评估4个前沿LLM在5种提示策略下的2400次实验，使用混合效应逻辑回归分析结果
AI.result: 发现三个关键结果：1)思维链悖论，思维链提示在明显案例中大幅提升性能但在反直觉案例中几乎无效；2)直觉性是主导因素，解释方差超过模型选择或提示策略；3)知识-推理分离，引用熟悉度与准确性无关
AI.conclusion: 从双过程理论视角看，当前LLMs的"慢思考"可能只是"慢说话"，它们产生了深思熟虑推理的形式但缺乏实质内容，当发现与直觉矛盾时无法有效运用相关知识

title: How Many Tries Does It Take? Iterative Self-Repair in LLM Code Generation Across Model Scales and Benchmarks
summary: Large language models frequently fail to produce correct code on their first attempt, yet most benchmarks evaluate them in a single-shot setting. We investigate iterative self-repair (feeding execution errors back to the model for correction) across seven models spanning three families and both open-weight and proprietary providers: Llama 3.1 8B, Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 4 Scout (MoE, 16 experts), Llama 4 Maverick (MoE, 128 experts), Qwen3 32B, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Gemini 2.5 Pro. On HumanEval (164 problems) and MBPP Sanitized (257 problems) with up to five attempts, self-repair universally improves pass rates: +4.9 to +17.1 pp on HumanEval and +16.0 to +30.0 pp on MBPP. Gemini 2.5 Flash achieves the highest final pass rates (96.3% HumanEval, 93.8% MBPP). Most gains concentrate in the first two rounds.Error-type analysis shows assertion errors (logical mistakes) are the hardest to repair at ~45%, while syntax and name errors are repaired at substantially higher rates, connecting to broader findings on the limits of LLM self-correction. Prior work found that weaker models fail at self-repair or require fine-tuning; we show that modern instruction-tuned models succeed with prompting alone, even at 8B scale. We also provide the first comparison of dense and MoE architectures for self-repair, and extend the repair-vs-resampling tradeoff analysis to modern models. A prompt ablation reveals chain-of-thought repair yields up to +5.5 pp additional self-repair gain (measured as improvement in repair delta) over minimal prompting for capable models.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在代码生成中通过迭代自我修复（将执行错误反馈给模型进行修正）的效果，探索不同模型规模和架构下的修复能力
AI.motivation: 大多数基准测试在单次尝试设置下评估LLM的代码生成能力，但模型经常在第一次尝试时产生错误代码。需要研究迭代自我修复方法如何提高代码生成准确率，并比较不同模型规模、架构和提示策略的效果
AI.method: 在HumanEval（164个问题）和MBPP Sanitized（257个问题）上测试七个模型，包括Llama、Qwen和Gemini系列，允许最多五次尝试进行自我修复。分析错误类型修复率，比较密集和混合专家架构，进行提示消融实验
AI.result: 自我修复普遍提高通过率：HumanEval提高4.9-17.1个百分点，MBPP提高16.0-30.0个百分点。Gemini 2.5 Flash达到最高最终通过率（HumanEval 96.3%，MBPP 93.8%）。大多数增益集中在前两轮。断言错误最难修复（约45%），语法和名称错误修复率更高。思维链修复比最小提示多带来高达5.5个百分点的额外增益
AI.conclusion: 现代指令调优模型仅通过提示即可成功进行自我修复，即使是8B规模模型。混合专家架构在自我修复方面表现良好。自我修复显著提高代码生成性能，但逻辑错误仍然最具挑战性。思维链提示进一步增强了修复能力

title: Beyond Compliance: A Resistance-Informed Motivation Reasoning Framework for Challenging Psychological Client Simulation
summary: Psychological client simulators have emerged as a scalable solution for training and evaluating counselor trainees and psychological LLMs. Yet existing simulators exhibit unrealistic over-compliance, leaving counselors underprepared for the challenging behaviors common in real-world practice. To bridge this gap, we present ResistClient, which systematically models challenging client behaviors grounded in Client Resistance Theory by integrating external behaviors with underlying motivational mechanisms. To this end, we propose Resistance-Informed Motivation Reasoning (RIMR), a two-stage training framework. First, RIMR mitigates compliance bias via supervised fine-tuning on RPC, a large-scale resistance-oriented psychological conversation dataset covering diverse client profiles. Second, beyond surface-level response imitation, RIMR models psychologically coherent motivation reasoning before response generation, jointly optimizing motivation authenticity and response consistency via process-supervised reinforcement learning. Extensive automatic and expert evaluations show that ResistClient substantially outperforms existing simulators in challenge fidelity, behavioral plausibility, and reasoning coherence. Moreover, ResistClient facilities evaluation of psychological LLMs under challenging conditions, offering new optimization directions for mental health dialogue systems.

AI.tldr: 提出ResistClient框架，通过建模具有挑战性的客户行为来改进心理客户模拟器，以更好地训练和评估心理咨询师及心理大语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有心理客户模拟器存在过度顺从的问题，无法模拟真实世界中常见的挑战性客户行为，导致咨询师训练不足，需要更真实的模拟环境。
AI.method: 提出抵抗知情动机推理（RIMR）两阶段训练框架：首先在RPC数据集上进行监督微调以减少顺从偏差；其次通过过程监督强化学习联合优化动机真实性和响应一致性。
AI.result: ResistClient在挑战保真度、行为合理性和推理连贯性方面显著优于现有模拟器，并能有效评估心理大语言模型在挑战性条件下的表现。
AI.conclusion: ResistClient通过系统建模客户抵抗行为，提供了更真实的心理客户模拟，为心理健康对话系统的优化提供了新方向。

title: A Progressive Training Strategy for Vision-Language Models to Counteract Spatio-Temporal Hallucinations in Embodied Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have made significant strides in static image understanding but continue to face critical hurdles in spatiotemporal reasoning. A major bottleneck is "multi-image reasoning hallucination", where a massive performance drop between forward and reverse temporal queries reveals a dependence on superficial shortcuts instead of genuine causal understanding. To mitigate this, we first develop a new Chain-of-Thought (CoT) dataset that decomposes intricate reasoning into detailed spatiotemporal steps and definitive judgments. Building on this, we present a progressive training framework: it initiates with supervised pre-training on our CoT dataset to instill logical structures, followed by fine-tuning with scalable weakly-labeled data for broader generalization. Our experiments demonstrate that this approach not only improves backbone accuracy but also slashes the forward-backward performance gap from over 70\% to only 6.53\%. This confirms the method's ability to develop authentic dynamic reasoning and reduce the inherent temporal biases of current VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种渐进式训练策略，用于解决视觉语言模型在具身推理中的时空幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在静态图像理解方面取得进展，但在时空推理中存在严重问题，特别是"多图像推理幻觉"现象，即模型依赖表面捷径而非真正的因果理解，导致前向和后向时间查询之间存在巨大性能差距
AI.method: 首先创建新的思维链数据集，将复杂推理分解为详细的时空步骤和确定性判断；然后提出渐进式训练框架：先在思维链数据集上进行监督预训练以建立逻辑结构，再使用可扩展的弱标签数据进行微调以实现更广泛的泛化
AI.result: 该方法不仅提高了骨干模型的准确性，还将前向-后向性能差距从超过70%降低到仅6.53%，证实了该方法能够发展真实的动态推理能力并减少当前视觉语言模型的固有时间偏差
AI.conclusion: 渐进式训练策略能有效对抗视觉语言模型在具身推理中的时空幻觉，通过思维链数据集和两阶段训练方法显著改善了模型的时空推理能力，减少了时间偏差

title: Cooperation in Human and Machine Agents: Promise Theory Considerations
summary: Agent based systems are more common than we may think. A Promise Theory perspective on cooperation, in systems of human-machine agents, offers a unified perspective on organization and functional design with semi-automated efforts, in terms of the abstract properties of autonomous agents, This applies to human efforts, hardware systems, software, and artificial intelligence, with and without management. One may ask how does a reasoning system of components keep to an intended purpose? As the agent paradigm is now being revived, in connection with artificial intelligence agents, I revisit established principles of agent cooperation, as applied to humans, machines, and their mutual interactions. Promise Theory represents the fundamentals of signalling, comprehension, trust, risk, and feedback between agents, and offers some lessons about success and failure.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了从承诺理论视角分析人机代理系统中的合作问题，为包含人类、硬件、软件和人工智能的混合系统提供统一的设计和组织框架。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能代理的复兴，需要重新审视人机混合系统中代理合作的基本原则，理解组件系统如何保持预期目的，并为半自动化努力提供统一的设计视角。
AI.method: 采用承诺理论框架，分析自主代理的抽象特性，研究代理之间的信号传递、理解、信任、风险和反馈等基本机制。
AI.result: 承诺理论为人机代理系统的合作提供了统一的分析视角，揭示了成功与失败的经验教训，能够应用于人类努力、硬件系统、软件和人工智能等各种场景。
AI.conclusion: 承诺理论为理解和设计人机混合系统中的合作提供了有价值的理论框架，有助于实现更有效的组织结构和功能设计。

title: CARO: Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization for Robust Content Moderation
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 findings; under official publication process
summary: Current large language models (LLMs), even those explicitly trained for reasoning, often struggle with ambiguous content moderation cases due to misleading "decision shortcuts" embedded in context. Inspired by cognitive psychology insights into expert moderation, we introduce \caro (Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization), a novel two-stage training framework to induce robust analogical reasoning in LLMs. First, \caro bootstraps analogical reasoning chains via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) on moderation data and performs supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Second, we propose a customized direct preference optimization (DPO) approach to reinforce analogical reasoning behaviors explicitly. Unlike static retrieval methods, \caro dynamically generates tailored analogical references during inference, effectively mitigating harmful decision shortcuts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \caro substantially outperforms state-of-the-art reasoning models (DeepSeek R1, QwQ), specialized moderation models (LLaMA Guard), and advanced fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented methods, achieving an average F1 score improvement of 24.9\% on challenging ambiguous moderation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出CARO框架，通过类比推理优化来增强大语言模型在内容审核任务中的鲁棒性，解决模糊内容审核难题。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在内容审核中容易受到上下文中的"决策捷径"误导，特别是在模糊案例中表现不佳，需要更鲁棒的推理能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练框架：第一阶段通过检索增强生成构建类比推理链并进行监督微调；第二阶段提出定制化的直接偏好优化方法强化类比推理行为。
AI.result: CARO在模糊内容审核基准测试中显著优于现有推理模型和专门审核模型，平均F1分数提升24.9%。
AI.conclusion: CARO框架通过类比推理优化有效缓解了有害决策捷径问题，为内容审核任务提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Cross-Cultural Bias in Mel-Scale Representations: Evidence and Alternatives from Speech and Music
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at ICASSP 2026
summary: Modern audio systems universally employ mel-scale representations derived from 1940s Western psychoacoustic studies, potentially encoding cultural biases that create systematic performance disparities. We present a comprehensive evaluation of cross-cultural bias in audio front-ends, comparing mel-scale features with learnable alternatives (LEAF, SincNet) and psychoacoustic variants (ERB, Bark, CQT) across speech recognition (11 languages), music analysis (6 collections), and European acoustic scene classification (10 European cities). Our controlled experiments isolate front-end contributions while holding architecture and training protocols minimal and constant. Results demonstrate that mel-scale features yield 31.2% WER for tonal languages compared to 18.7% for non-tonal languages (12.5% gap), and show 15.7% F1 degradation between Western and non-Western music. Alternative representations significantly reduce these disparities: LEAF reduces the speech gap by 34% through adaptive frequency allocation, CQT achieves 52% reduction in music performance gaps, and ERB-scale filtering cuts disparities by 31% with only 1% computational overhead. We also release FairAudioBench, enabling cross-cultural evaluation, and demonstrate that adaptive frequency decomposition offers practical paths toward equitable audio processing. These findings reveal how foundational signal processing choices propagate bias, providing crucial guidance for developing inclusive audio systems.

AI.tldr: 评估音频前端处理中的跨文化偏见，比较梅尔尺度特征与可学习替代方案在语音识别、音乐分析和声学场景分类中的表现差异
AI.motivation: 现代音频系统普遍使用基于1940年代西方心理声学研究的梅尔尺度表示，可能编码文化偏见，导致不同文化背景音频处理性能的系统性差异
AI.method: 采用控制实验方法，比较梅尔尺度特征与可学习替代方案（LEAF、SincNet）和心理声学变体（ERB、Bark、CQT），在11种语言的语音识别、6个音乐数据集分析和10个欧洲城市的声学场景分类任务中进行评估
AI.result: 梅尔尺度特征在声调语言和非声调语言间产生12.5%的WER差距，西方与非西方音乐间F1分数下降15.7%；替代表示显著减少这些差异：LEAF减少语音差距34%，CQT减少音乐性能差距52%，ERB尺度滤波仅增加1%计算开销就减少31%差异
AI.conclusion: 基础信号处理选择会传播偏见，自适应频率分解为公平音频处理提供了实用路径，研究揭示了音频系统中文化偏见的存在并提供了开发包容性系统的关键指导

title: CHAIRO: Contextual Hierarchical Analogical Induction and Reasoning Optimization for LLMs
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 main conference; under official publication process
summary: Content moderation in online platforms faces persistent challenges due to the evolving complexity of user-generated content and the limitations of traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches. While recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled more sophisticated moderation via direct prompting or fine-tuning, these approaches often exhibit limited generalization, interpretability, and adaptability to unseen or ambiguous cases. In this work, we propose a novel moderation framework that leverages analogical examples to enhance rule induction and decision reliability. Our approach integrates end-to-end optimization of analogical retrieval, rule generation, and moderation classification, enabling the dynamic adaptation of moderation rules to diverse content scenarios. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms both rule-injected fine-tuning baselines and multi-stage static RAG pipelines in terms of moderation accuracy and rule quality. Further evaluations, including human assessments and external model generalization tests, confirm that our framework produces rules with better clarity, interpretability, and applicability. These findings show that analogical example-driven methods can advance robust, explainable, and generalizable content moderation in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于类比示例的内容审核框架，通过上下文层次类比归纳与推理优化提升LLMs在内容审核中的性能
AI.motivation: 在线平台内容审核面临用户生成内容复杂性增加、传统规则和机器学习方法泛化能力有限、LLMs直接提示或微调方法在未见或模糊案例中表现不佳等问题
AI.method: 提出CHAIRO框架，集成类比检索、规则生成和审核分类的端到端优化，通过类比示例动态适应不同内容场景的审核规则
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在审核准确率和规则质量上显著优于规则注入微调基准和多阶段静态RAG管道，人类评估和外部模型泛化测试确认生成规则具有更好的清晰度、可解释性和适用性
AI.conclusion: 类比示例驱动的方法能够推进现实应用中稳健、可解释和可泛化的内容审核，为内容审核系统提供了更有效的解决方案

title: Visual Enhanced Depth Scaling for Multimodal Latent Reasoning
summary: Multimodal latent reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm that replaces explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) decoding with implicit feature propagation, simultaneously enhancing representation informativeness and reducing inference latency. By analyzing token-level gradient dynamics during latent training, we reveal two critical observations: (1) visual tokens exhibit significantly higher and more volatile gradient norms than their textual counterparts due to inherent language bias, resulting in systematic visual under-optimization; and (2) semantically simple tokens converge rapidly, whereas complex tokens exhibit persistent gradient instability constrained by fixed architectural depths. To address these limitations, we propose a visual replay module and routing depth scaling to collaboratively enhance visual perception and refine complicated latents for deeper contextual reasoning. The former module leverages causal self-attention to estimate token saliency, reinforcing fine-grained grounding through spatially-coherent constraints. Complementarily, the latter mechanism adaptively allocates additional reasoning steps to complex tokens, enabling deeper contextual refinement. Guided by a curriculum strategy that progressively internalizes explicit CoT into compact latent representations, our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse benchmarks while delivering substantial inference speedups over explicit CoT baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种视觉增强深度缩放方法，用于改进多模态潜在推理，通过分析训练中的梯度动态来解决视觉标记优化不足和复杂标记收敛困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 研究发现多模态潜在推理中存在两个关键问题：视觉标记由于语言偏见导致梯度规范显著高于文本标记，造成系统性视觉优化不足；语义简单标记快速收敛而复杂标记受固定架构深度限制表现出持续梯度不稳定。
AI.method: 提出视觉重放模块和路由深度缩放机制，前者利用因果自注意力估计标记显著性并通过空间一致性约束增强细粒度定位，后者自适应地为复杂标记分配额外推理步骤以实现更深层上下文细化。
AI.result: 该方法在多种基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，同时相比显式思维链基线显著提升了推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过渐进式课程策略将显式思维链内部化为紧凑潜在表示，该框架有效解决了多模态潜在推理中的视觉优化不足和复杂标记收敛问题，实现了性能与效率的双重提升。

authors: Karie A. Nicholas Vikram Khipple Mulligan
title: Entangled happily ever after: Wedding reception seating mapped to classical and quantum optimizers
summary: Although optimization is one of the most promising applications of quantum computers, the development of effective optimization strategies requires real-world test cases. When planning our recent wedding reception, we realized that the problem of optimally seating our guests, given constraints related to guests' relatedness, shared interests, and physical needs, could be mapped to a cost function network (CFN) form solvable with classical or quantum optimization algorithms. We compared the seating optimization performance of classical Monte Carlo CFN solvers in the Masala software suite to that of quantum annealing-based CFN optimization algorithms using one-hot, domain-wall, and approximate binary mappings, which we had developed for protein design problems. Surprisingly, the D-Wave Advantage 2 system, which performs well on similarly-structured CFN problems for protein design, struggled to return optimal seating arrangements that were easily found by classical Monte Carlo methods. We provide our seating optimization benchmark set, and code to convert seating optimization problems to CFN problems, as a plugin library for Masala, permitting this class of real-world problems to be used to benchmark performance of current and future classical CFN solvers, quantum optimization algorithms, and quantum computing hardware.

AI.tldr: 将婚礼宾客座位安排问题映射为可优化问题，比较经典蒙特卡洛方法和量子退火算法在解决该问题上的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 为量子计算优化算法开发需要真实世界的测试案例，婚礼座位安排问题提供了具有实际约束的优化问题，可用于评估经典和量子优化方法的性能。
AI.method: 将宾客座位安排问题转化为成本函数网络形式，使用Masala软件套件中的经典蒙特卡洛求解器，并与量子退火算法（包括one-hot、domain-wall和近似二进制映射）进行比较，这些算法原本是为蛋白质设计问题开发的。
AI.result: 经典蒙特卡洛方法能够轻松找到最优座位安排，而D-Wave Advantage 2量子计算系统在类似结构的蛋白质设计问题上表现良好，但在座位安排问题上却难以返回最优解。
AI.conclusion: 提供了座位安排优化基准测试集和转换代码作为Masala插件库，使这类现实世界问题能够用于评估当前和未来经典求解器、量子优化算法及量子计算硬件的性能。

title: Make it Simple, Make it Dance: Dance Motion Simplification to Support Novices' Dance Learning
summary: Online dance tutorials have gained widespread popularity. However, many novices encounter difficulties when dance motion complexity exceeds their skill level, potentially leading to discouragement. This study explores dance motion simplification to address this challenge. We surveyed 30 novices to identify challenging movements, then conducted focus groups with 30 professional choreographers across 10 genres to explore simplification strategies and collect paired original-simplified dance datasets. We identified five complexity factors and developed automated simplification methods using both rule-based and learning-based approaches. We validated our approach through three evaluations. Technical evaluation confirmed our complexity measures and algorithms. 20 professional choreographers assessed motion naturalness, simplification adequacy, and style preservation. 18 novices evaluated learning effectiveness through workload, self-efficacy, objective performance, and perceived difficulty. This work contributes to dance education technology by proposing methods that help make choreography more approachable for beginners while preserving essential characteristics.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究舞蹈动作简化技术，旨在通过自动化方法降低舞蹈动作复杂度，帮助初学者更有效地学习舞蹈。
AI.motivation: 在线舞蹈教程日益流行，但初学者常因动作复杂度过高而难以掌握，容易产生挫败感。需要开发技术手段降低学习门槛，使舞蹈教学更加平易近人。
AI.method: 首先调查30名初学者识别困难动作，然后与30名专业编舞师进行焦点小组讨论，收集原始-简化舞蹈数据集。识别五个复杂度因素，开发基于规则和基于学习的自动化简化方法，并通过技术评估、专业编舞师评估和初学者学习效果评估进行验证。
AI.result: 技术评估确认了复杂度测量和算法的有效性；20名专业编舞师评估显示动作自然度、简化适当性和风格保留良好；18名初学者评估表明学习效果在认知负荷、自我效能、客观表现和感知难度方面均有改善。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的舞蹈动作简化方法能有效降低初学者学习难度，同时保持舞蹈动作的基本特征，为舞蹈教育技术提供了有价值的工具，使编舞对初学者更加友好。

title: UDAPose: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Low-Light Human Pose Estimation
summary: Low-visibility scenarios, such as low-light conditions, pose significant challenges to human pose estimation due to the scarcity of annotated low-light datasets and the loss of visual information under poor illumination. Recent domain adaptation techniques attempt to utilize well-lit labels by augmenting well-lit images to mimic low-light conditions. But handcrafted augmentations oversimplify noise patterns, while learning-based methods often fail to preserve high-frequency low-light characteristics, producing unrealistic images that lead pose models to generalize poorly to real low-light scenes. Moreover, recent pose estimators rely on image cues through image-to-keypoint cross-attention, but these cues become unreliable under low-light conditions. To address these issues, we propose Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Pose Estimation (UDAPose), a novel framework that synthesizes low-light images and dynamically fuses visual cues with pose priors for improved pose estimation. Specifically, our synthesis method incorporates a Direct-Current-based High-Pass Filter (DHF) and a Low-light Characteristics Injection Module (LCIM) to inject high-frequency details from input low-light images, overcoming rigidity or the detail loss in existing approaches. Furthermore, we introduce a Dynamic Control of Attention (DCA) module that adaptively balances image cues with learned pose priors in the Transformer architecture. Experiments show that UDAPose outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with notable AP gains of 10.1 (56.4%) on the ExLPose-test hard set (LL-H) and 7.4 (31.4%) in cross-dataset validation on EHPT-XC. Code: https://github.com/Vision-and-Multimodal-Intelligence-Lab/UDAPose

AI.tldr: 提出UDAPose框架，用于低光照条件下的人体姿态估计的无监督域自适应
AI.motivation: 低光照场景下人体姿态估计面临标注数据稀缺和视觉信息丢失的挑战，现有域自适应方法生成的低光照图像不真实，且姿态估计器依赖的图像线索在低光照下不可靠
AI.method: 提出包含DHF和LCIM的低光照图像合成方法，以及DCA模块动态融合视觉线索与姿态先验的Transformer架构
AI.result: 在ExLPose-test hard set上获得10.1 AP增益（56.4%），在EHPT-XC跨数据集验证上获得7.4 AP增益（31.4%），优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: UDAPose通过合成真实低光照图像和动态平衡图像线索与姿态先验，显著提升了低光照人体姿态估计性能

title: Tracing the Roots: A Multi-Agent Framework for Uncovering Data Lineage in Post-Training LLMs
summary: Post-training data plays a pivotal role in shaping the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet datasets are often treated as isolated artifacts, overlooking the systemic connections that underlie their evolution. To disentangle these complex relationships, we introduce the concept of \textbf{data lineage} to the LLM ecosystem and propose an automated multi-agent framework to reconstruct the evolutionary graph of dataset development. Through large-scale lineage analysis, we characterize domain-specific structural patterns, such as vertical refinement in math-oriented datasets and horizontal aggregation in general-domain corpora. Moreover, we uncover pervasive systemic issues, including \textit{structural redundancy} induced by implicit dataset intersections and the \textit{propagation of benchmark contamination} along lineage paths. To demonstrate the practical value of lineage analysis for data construction, we leverage the reconstructed lineage graph to create a \textit{lineage-aware diversity-oriented dataset}. By anchoring instruction sampling at upstream root sources, this approach mitigates downstream homogenization and hidden redundancy, yielding a more diverse post-training corpus. We further highlight lineage-centric analysis as an efficient and robust topological alternative to sample-level dataset comparison for large-scale data ecosystems. By grounding data construction in explicit lineage structures, our work advances post-training data curation toward a more systematic and controllable paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多智能体框架，用于追踪后训练LLM中数据集的演化谱系，揭示数据集之间的系统连接和演化模式。
AI.motivation: 后训练数据对LLM能力塑造至关重要，但数据集常被视为孤立产物，忽略了其演化过程中的系统连接，导致结构冗余和基准污染传播等问题。
AI.method: 引入数据谱系概念，提出自动化多智能体框架重建数据集演化图，通过大规模谱系分析识别结构模式，并利用谱系图创建谱系感知的多样性数据集。
AI.result: 揭示了领域特异性结构模式（如数学数据集的垂直细化和通用领域语料库的水平聚合），发现了系统性问题和基准污染传播，谱系感知方法能产生更多样化的后训练语料库。
AI.conclusion: 通过将数据构建建立在明确的谱系结构上，推动了后训练数据管理向更系统化和可控的范式发展，谱系中心分析为大规模数据生态系统提供了高效稳健的拓扑替代方案。

title: PEMANT: Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel
summary: Modeling household-level trip generation is fundamental to accurate demand forecasting, traffic flow estimation, and urban system planning. Existing studies were mostly based on classical machine learning models with limited predictive capability, while recent LLM-based approaches have yet to incorporate behavioral theory or intra-household interaction dynamics, both of which are critical for modeling realistic collective travel decisions. To address these limitations, we propose a novel LLM-based framework, named Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel (PEMANT), which first integrates behavioral theory for individualized persona modeling and then conducts household-level trip planning negotiations via a structured multi-agent conversation. Specifically, PEMANT transforms static sociodemographic attributes into coherent narrative profiles that explicitly encode household-level attitudes, subjective norms, and perceived behavioral controls, following our proposed Household-Aware Chain-of-Planned-Behavior (HA-CoPB) framework. Building on these theory-grounded personas, PEMANT captures real-world household decision negotiation via a structured two-phase multi-agent conversation framework with a novel persona-alignment control mechanism. Evaluated on both national and regional household travel survey datasets, PEMANT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出PEMANT框架，用于建模家庭层面的出行生成，通过个性化角色建模和结构化多智能体谈判来模拟家庭集体出行决策。
AI.motivation: 现有研究大多基于预测能力有限的经典机器学习模型，而最近的LLM方法尚未纳入行为理论或家庭内部互动动态，这两者对建模现实的集体出行决策至关重要。
AI.method: 提出PEMANT框架：首先通过HA-CoPB框架将静态社会人口属性转化为连贯的叙事角色，然后通过结构化两阶段多智能体对话框架进行家庭层面的出行规划谈判，包含角色对齐控制机制。
AI.result: 在国家和区域家庭出行调查数据集上评估，PEMANT在多个数据集上始终优于最先进的基准模型。
AI.conclusion: PEMANT成功整合了行为理论和家庭内部互动动态，为建模现实的集体出行决策提供了有效框架，在预测性能上超越了现有方法。

title: From Query to Counsel: Structured Reasoning with a Multi-Agent Framework and Dataset for Legal Consultation
summary: Legal consultation question answering (Legal CQA) presents unique challenges compared to traditional legal QA tasks, including the scarcity of high-quality training data, complex task composition, and strong contextual dependencies. To address these, we construct JurisCQAD, a large-scale dataset of over 43,000 real-world Chinese legal queries annotated with expert-validated positive and negative responses, and design a structured task decomposition that converts each query into a legal element graph integrating entities, events, intents, and legal issues. We further propose JurisMA, a modular multi-agent framework supporting dynamic routing, statutory grounding, and stylistic optimization. Combined with the element graph, the framework enables strong context-aware reasoning, effectively capturing dependencies across legal facts, norms, and procedural logic. Trained on JurisCQAD and evaluated on a refined LawBench, our system significantly outperforms both general-purpose and legal-domain LLMs across multiple lexical and semantic metrics, demonstrating the benefits of interpretable decomposition and modular collaboration in Legal CQA.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究法律咨询问答任务，通过构建大规模数据集和多智能体框架来解决法律咨询中的复杂问题。
AI.motivation: 法律咨询问答面临高质量训练数据稀缺、任务组成复杂和强上下文依赖等独特挑战，需要专门的方法来解决。
AI.method: 构建JurisCQAD数据集（超过43,000个中文法律查询），设计结构化任务分解将查询转换为法律要素图，并提出JurisMA多智能体框架支持动态路由、法规基础和风格优化。
AI.result: 在精炼的LawBench上评估，系统在多个词汇和语义指标上显著优于通用和特定法律领域的LLM，展示了可解释分解和模块化协作的优势。
AI.conclusion: 结构化分解和多智能体框架能够有效解决法律咨询问答的挑战，实现强上下文感知推理，在法律咨询领域具有重要应用价值。

title: ExpertEdit: Learning Skill-Aware Motion Editing from Expert Videos
summary: Visual feedback is critical for motor skill acquisition in sports and rehabilitation, and psychological studies show that observing near-perfect versions of one's own performance accelerates learning more effectively than watching expert demonstrations alone. We propose to enable such personalized feedback by automatically editing a person's motion to reflect higher skill. Existing motion editing approaches are poorly suited for this setting because they assume paired input-output data -- rare and expensive to curate for skill-driven tasks -- and explicit edit guidance at inference. We introduce ExpertEdit, a framework for skill-driven motion editing trained exclusively on unpaired expert video demonstrations. ExpertEdit learns an expert motion prior with a masked language modeling objective that infills masked motion spans with expert-level refinements. At inference, novice motion is masked at skill-critical moments and projected into the learned expert manifold, producing localized skill improvements without paired supervision or manual edit guidance. Across eight diverse techniques and three sports from Ego-Exo4D and Karate Kyokushin, ExpertEdit outperforms state-of-the-art supervised motion editing methods on multiple metrics of motion realism and expert quality. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/expert_edit/ .

AI.tldr: 提出ExpertEdit框架，从专家视频中学习技能感知的运动编辑，将新手运动自动编辑为更高技能水平
AI.motivation: 视觉反馈对运动技能学习至关重要，观察接近完美的个人表现比单纯观看专家演示更能加速学习。现有运动编辑方法需要配对数据且依赖显式编辑指导，不适用于技能驱动的任务
AI.method: 使用掩码语言建模目标学习专家运动先验，在推理时掩码新手运动的关键技能时刻并投影到学习的专家流形中，无需配对监督或手动编辑指导
AI.result: 在Ego-Exo4D和Karate Kyokushin的8种不同技术和3种运动中，ExpertEdit在运动真实性和专家质量多个指标上优于最先进的监督运动编辑方法
AI.conclusion: ExpertEdit能够从非配对专家视频中学习技能感知的运动编辑，实现局部技能改进，为个性化技能学习反馈提供了有效解决方案

title: Rethinking the Diffusion Model from a Langevin Perspective
summary: Diffusion models are often introduced from multiple perspectives, such as VAEs, score matching, or flow matching, accompanied by dense and technically demanding mathematics that can be difficult for beginners to grasp. One classic question is: how does the reverse process invert the forward process to generate data from pure noise? This article systematically organizes the diffusion model from a fresh Langevin perspective, offering a simpler, clearer, and more intuitive answer. We also address the following questions: how can ODE-based and SDE-based diffusion models be unified under a single framework? Why are diffusion models theoretically superior to ordinary VAEs? Why is flow matching not fundamentally simpler than denoising or score matching, but equivalent under maximum-likelihood? We demonstrate that the Langevin perspective offers clear and straightforward answers to these questions, bridging existing interpretations of diffusion models, showing how different formulations can be converted into one another within a common framework, and offering pedagogical value for both learners and experienced researchers seeking deeper intuition.

AI.tldr: 从朗之万动力学视角重新审视扩散模型，提供更简单直观的理解框架
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型解释多从VAE、分数匹配或流匹配等角度，数学复杂且难以理解，特别是反向过程如何从纯噪声生成数据这一核心问题
AI.method: 采用朗之万动力学视角系统整理扩散模型，将ODE和SDE为基础的扩散模型统一到单一框架下
AI.result: 朗之万视角为扩散模型提供了清晰直观的解释，展示了不同表述在共同框架下的相互转换，回答了扩散模型的理论优势等关键问题
AI.conclusion: 朗之万视角不仅简化了扩散模型的理解，还统一了不同表述，具有重要的教学价值，为学习者和研究者提供了更深刻的直觉

title: ZoomTable: Interactive Exploration of Data Facts in Hierarchical Tables via Semantic Zooming
summary: Hierarchical tables are an important structure for organizing data with inherent hierarchical relationships. Existing studies have extensively explored methods for data fact exploration from tabular data. In particular, some studies have directly integrated visual data facts into the original table structure to support in-situ exploration, because embedding data facts within the table context can reduce cognitive load by minimizing attention shifts. However, embedding a large amount of extracted data facts into the limited space of hierarchical tables often leads to layout conflicts, hindering effective exploration. To address this issue, we propose an interactive exploration paradigm for hierarchical table data facts based on semantic zooming and develop an interactive visualization system, ZoomTable. The ZoomTable system employs semantic zooming as the interaction method, combined with a data-fact layout method and a data fact recommendation mechanism. This combination not only resolves layout conflicts, but also supports users in coherently exploring multidimensional data facts at different scales. A case study and a user experiment further validate the practicality and efficiency of ZoomTable in real-world data fact exploration scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出ZoomTable系统，通过语义缩放交互探索层次化表格中的数据事实，解决数据事实嵌入表格时的布局冲突问题
AI.motivation: 现有研究将数据事实嵌入原始表格结构进行原位探索，但在层次化表格中嵌入大量数据事实会导致布局冲突，阻碍有效探索
AI.method: 基于语义缩放的交互探索范式，结合数据事实布局方法和数据事实推荐机制，开发ZoomTable可视化系统
AI.result: 案例研究和用户实验验证了ZoomTable在实际数据事实探索场景中的实用性和效率
AI.conclusion: ZoomTable系统通过语义缩放解决了层次化表格中数据事实探索的布局冲突问题，支持用户在不同尺度上连贯探索多维数据事实

title: Toward Accountable AI-Generated Content on Social Platforms: Steganographic Attribution and Multimodal Harm Detection
summary: The rapid growth of generative AI has introduced new challenges in content moderation and digital forensics. In particular, benign AI-generated images can be paired with harmful or misleading text, creating difficult-to-detect misuse. This contextual misuse undermines the traditional moderation framework and complicates attribution, as synthetic images typically lack persistent metadata or device signatures. We introduce a steganography enabled attribution framework that embeds cryptographically signed identifiers into images at creation time and uses multimodal harmful content detection as a trigger for attribution verification. Our system evaluates five watermarking methods across spatial, frequency, and wavelet domains. It also integrates a CLIP-based fusion model for multimodal harmful-content detection. Experiments demonstrate that spread-spectrum watermarking, especially in the wavelet domain, provides strong robustness under blur distortions, and our multimodal fusion detector achieves an AUC-ROC of 0.99, enabling reliable cross-modal attribution verification. These components form an end-to-end forensic pipeline that enables reliable tracing of harmful deployments of AI-generated imagery, supporting accountability in modern synthetic media environments. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/bli1/steganography

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于社交媒体平台上AI生成内容问责的端到端取证框架，结合隐写术溯源和多模态有害内容检测。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展给内容审核和数字取证带来了新挑战，特别是良性AI生成图像可能被配上有害或误导性文本，形成难以检测的滥用。这种上下文滥用破坏了传统审核框架，并使溯源复杂化，因为合成图像通常缺乏持久的元数据或设备签名。
AI.method: 引入基于隐写术的溯源框架，在创建时将加密签名的标识符嵌入图像中，并使用多模态有害内容检测作为溯源验证的触发机制。系统评估了空间域、频域和小波域的5种水印方法，并集成了基于CLIP的融合模型进行多模态有害内容检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，扩展频谱水印（特别是小波域）在模糊失真下具有强鲁棒性，多模态融合检测器的AUC-ROC达到0.99，实现了可靠的跨模态溯源验证。
AI.conclusion: 这些组件构成了一个端到端的取证管道，能够可靠追踪AI生成图像的有害部署，支持现代合成媒体环境中的问责机制。

title: Towards Green Wearable Computing: A Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network for Energy-Efficient IMU-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Wearable IMU-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) relies heavily on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), which are burdened by immense computational and buffering demands. Their power-hungry floating-point operations and rigid requirement to process complete temporal windows severely cripple battery-constrained edge devices. While Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer extreme event-driven energy efficiency, standard architectures struggle with complex biomechanical topologies and temporal gradient degradation. To bridge this gap, we propose the Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network (PAS-Net), a fully multiplier-free architecture explicitly tailored for Green HAR. Spatially, an adaptive symmetric topology mixer enforces human-joint physical constraints. Temporally, an $O(1)$-memory causal neuromodulator yields context-aware dynamic threshold neurons, adapting actively to non-stationary movement rhythms. Furthermore, we leverage a temporal spike error objective to unlock a flexible early-exit mechanism for continuous IMU streams. Evaluated across seven diverse datasets, PAS-Net achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while replacing dense operations with sparse 0.1 pJ integer accumulations. Crucially, its confidence-driven early-exit capability drastically reduces dynamic energy consumption by up to 98\%. PAS-Net establishes a robust, ultra-low-power neuromorphic standard for always-on wearable sensing.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向绿色可穿戴计算的物理感知脉冲神经网络，用于基于IMU的节能人体活动识别
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络在可穿戴设备上进行人体活动识别时存在高计算负载和能耗问题，而标准脉冲神经网络难以处理复杂的生物力学拓扑和时间梯度退化
AI.method: 提出物理感知脉冲神经网络，包含自适应对称拓扑混合器强制执行人体关节物理约束，O(1)记忆因果神经调节器产生上下文感知动态阈值神经元，并利用时间脉冲误差目标实现灵活的早期退出机制
AI.result: 在七个不同数据集上评估，PAS-Net达到最先进的准确率，同时将密集操作替换为稀疏的0.1pJ整数累加，早期退出能力将动态能耗降低高达98%
AI.conclusion: PAS-Net为始终在线的可穿戴传感建立了强大、超低功耗的神经形态标准，实现了绿色人体活动识别

title: Near Optimal Algorithms for Noisy $k$-XOR under Low-Degree Heuristic
summary: Noisy $k$-XOR is a basic average-case inference problem in which one observes random noisy $k$-ary parity constraints and seeks to recover, or more weakly, detect, a hidden Boolean assignment. A central question is to characterize the tradeoff among sample complexity, noise level, and running time. We give a recovery algorithm, and hence also a detection algorithm, for noisy $k$-XOR in the high-noise regime. For every parameter $D$, our algorithm runs in time $n^{D+O(1)}$ and succeeds whenever $$ m \ge C_k \frac{n^{k/2}}{D^{\,k/2-1}δ^2}, $$ where $C_k$ is an explicit constant depending only on $k$, and $δ$ is the noise bias. Our result matches the best previously known time--sample tradeoff for detection, while simultaneously yielding recovery guarantees. In addition, the dependence on the noise bias $δ$ is optimal up to constant factors, matching the information-theoretic scaling. We also prove matching low-degree lower bounds. In particular, we show that the degree-$D$ low-degree likelihood ratio has bounded $L^2$-norm below the same threshold, up to the same factor $D^{k/2-1}$. Under the low-degree heuristic, this implies that our algorithm is near-optimal over a broad range of parameters. Our approach combines a refined second-moment analysis with color coding and dynamic programming for structured hypergraph embedding statistics. These techniques may be of independent interest for other average-case inference problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了噪声k-XOR问题，这是一个基本的平均情况推断问题，旨在从随机噪声的k元奇偶约束中恢复或检测隐藏的布尔赋值。
AI.motivation: 噪声k-XOR是平均情况推断中的基本问题，核心挑战在于刻画样本复杂度、噪声水平和运行时间之间的权衡关系，特别是在高噪声区域。
AI.method: 结合改进的二阶矩分析、颜色编码和动态规划技术，用于结构化超图嵌入统计，开发了恢复算法和检测算法。
AI.result: 提出了在时间n^{D+O(1)}内运行的算法，当m ≥ C_k n^{k/2}/(D^{k/2-1}δ^2)时成功，其中噪声偏置δ的依赖达到常数因子的最优性，并证明了匹配的低度下界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在广泛的参数范围内接近最优，匹配了检测的最佳时间-样本权衡，同时提供恢复保证，所开发的技术对其他平均情况推断问题具有独立价值。

title: A Benchmark and Multi-Agent System for Instruction-driven Cinematic Video Compilation
summary: The surging demand for adapting long-form cinematic content into short videos has motivated the need for versatile automatic video compilation systems. However, existing compilation methods are limited to predefined tasks, and the community lacks a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate the cinematic compilation. To address this, we introduce CineBench, the first benchmark for instruction-driven cinematic video compilation, featuring diverse user instructions and high-quality ground-truth compilations annotated by professional editors. To overcome contextual collapse and temporal fragmentation, we present CineAgents, a multi-agent system that reformulates cinematic video compilation into ``design-and-compose'' paradigm. CineAgents performs script reverse-engineering to construct a hierarchical narrative memory to provide multi-level context and employs an iterative narrative planning process that refines a creative blueprint into a final compiled script. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CineAgents significantly outperforms existing methods, generating compilations with superior narrative coherence and logical coherence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个指令驱动的电影视频剪辑基准测试和多智能体系统，用于从长视频中根据用户指令自动生成高质量短片。
AI.motivation: 长视频内容改编为短视频的需求激增，但现有剪辑方法局限于预定义任务，且缺乏全面的电影剪辑评估基准，存在上下文崩溃和时间碎片化问题。
AI.method: 提出CineAgents多智能体系统，采用"设计-组合"范式，通过脚本逆向工程构建分层叙事记忆，采用迭代叙事规划将创意蓝图细化为最终剪辑脚本。
AI.result: 实验表明CineAgents显著优于现有方法，生成的剪辑在叙事连贯性和逻辑一致性方面表现优越。
AI.conclusion: CineBench是首个指令驱动的电影视频剪辑基准，CineAgents系统通过多级上下文和迭代规划有效解决了电影剪辑中的关键挑战。

title: AIM-Bench: Benchmarking and Improving Affective Image Manipulation via Fine-Grained Hierarchical Control
summary: Affective Image Manipulation (AIM) aims to evoke specific emotions through targeted editing. Current image editing benchmarks primarily focus on object-level modifications in general scenarios, lacking the fine-grained granularity to capture affective dimensions. To bridge this gap, we introduce the first benchmark designed for AIM termed AIM-Bench. This benchmark is built upon a dual-path affective modeling scheme that integrates the Mikels emotion taxonomy with the Valence-Arousal-Dominance framework, enabling high-level semantic and fine-grained continuous manipulation. Through a hierarchical human-in-the-loop workflow, we finally curate 800 high-quality samples covering 8 emotional categories and 5 editing types. To effectively assess performance, we also design a composite evaluation suite combining rule-based and model-based metrics to holistically assess instruction consistency, aesthetics, and emotional expressiveness. Extensive evaluations reveal that current editing models face significant challenges, most notably a prevalent positivity bias, which stemming from inherent imbalances in training data distribution. To tackle this, we propose a scalable data engine utilizing an inverse repainting strategy to construct AIM-40k, a balanced instruction-tuning dataset comprising 40k samples. Concretely, we enhance raw affective images via generative redrawing to establish high-fidelity ground truths, and synthesize input images with divergent emotions and paired precise instructions. Fine-tuning a baseline model on AIM-40k yields a 9.15% relative improvement in overall performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our AIM-40k. Our data and related code will be made open soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AIM-Bench基准测试，用于评估和改进情感图像编辑任务，通过细粒度分层控制实现情感维度的精准编辑。
AI.motivation: 当前图像编辑基准主要关注通用场景下的对象级修改，缺乏捕捉情感维度的细粒度控制能力，需要专门的基准来评估情感图像编辑性能。
AI.method: 采用双路径情感建模方案，结合Mikels情感分类和VAD框架；通过分层人机协作流程构建800个高质量样本；提出逆重绘策略构建平衡的AIM-40k数据集；设计结合规则和模型的多指标评估套件。
AI.result: 评估显示现有模型存在显著的正向偏差问题；构建的AIM-40k数据集使基线模型整体性能相对提升9.15%，证明了数据平衡策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AIM-Bench填补了情感图像编辑评估的空白，提出的数据平衡策略能有效改善模型性能，为情感图像编辑研究提供了重要基准和数据集资源。

title: Parameter Efficient Fine-tuning for Domain-specific Gastrointestinal Disease Recognition
summary: Despite recent advancements in the field of medical image analysis with the use of pretrained foundation models, the issue of distribution shifts between cross-source images largely remains adamant. To circumvent that issue, investigators generally train a separate model for each source. However, this method becomes expensive when we fully fine-tune pretrained large models for a single dataset, as we must store multiple copies of those models. Thus, in this work, we propose using a low-rank adaptation (LoRA) module for fine-tuning downstream classification tasks. LoRAs learn lightweight task-specific low-rank matrices that perturb pretrained weights to optimize those downstream tasks. For gastrointestinal tract diseases, they exhibit significantly better results than end-to-end finetuning with improved parameter efficiency. Code is available at: github.com/sanjay931/peft-gi-recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究使用低秩适应（LoRA）模块进行参数高效微调，用于特定领域胃肠道疾病识别任务。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中，跨源图像间的分布偏移问题严重，通常需要为每个数据源单独训练模型，但全参数微调大型预训练模型成本高昂，需要存储多个模型副本。
AI.method: 提出使用低秩适应（LoRA）模块进行下游分类任务微调，LoRA学习轻量级任务特定的低秩矩阵来扰动预训练权重，优化下游任务。
AI.result: 对于胃肠道疾病识别，LoRA方法相比端到端微调表现出显著更好的结果，同时提高了参数效率。
AI.conclusion: LoRA方法在胃肠道疾病识别任务中实现了参数高效微调，优于传统端到端微调方法，代码已开源。

title: Tradeoffs in Privacy, Welfare, and Fairness for Facility Location
summary: The differentially private (DP) facility location problem seeks to determine a socially optimal placement for a public facility while ensuring that each participating agent's location remains private. To privatize its input data, a DP mechanism must inject noise into its output distribution, producing a placement that will have lower expected social welfare than the optimal spot for the facility. The privacy-induced welfare loss can be viewed as the "cost of privacy," illustrating a tradeoff between social welfare and privacy that has been the focus of prior work. Yet, the imposition of privacy also induces a third consideration that has not been similarly studied: fairness in how the "cost of privacy" is distributed across individuals. For instance, a mechanism may satisfy DP with minimal social welfare loss, yet still be undesirable if that loss falls entirely on one individual. In this paper, we quantify this new notion of unfairness and design mechanisms for facility location that attempt to simultaneously optimize across privacy, social welfare, and fairness. We first derive an impossibility result, showing that privacy and fairness cannot be simultaneously guaranteed over all possible datasets that could represent the locations of individuals in a population. We then consider a relaxation that still requires worst-case DP, but only seeks fairness and social welfare over smaller, more "realistic-looking" families of datasets. For this relaxation, we construct a DP mechanism and demonstrate that it is simultaneously optimal (or, for a harder family of datasets, near-optimal up to small factors) on fairness and social welfare. This suggests that while there is a tradeoff between privacy and each of social welfare and fairness, there is no additional tradeoff when we consider all three objectives simultaneously, provided that the population data is sufficiently natural.

AI.tldr: 本文研究差分隐私设施选址问题，探讨如何在隐私保护、社会福利和公平性三个目标之间进行权衡，设计同时优化这三个目标的机制。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私机制在保护个体位置隐私的同时会降低社会福利，这种"隐私成本"可能不公平地分布在个体之间。现有研究主要关注隐私与社会福利的权衡，但隐私引入的公平性问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 首先证明隐私和公平性在所有可能数据集上无法同时保证的不可行性结果，然后考虑松弛条件：保持最坏情况差分隐私，仅在更"现实"的数据集族上要求公平性和社会福利，并为此构造差分隐私机制。
AI.result: 对于松弛条件，构造的差分隐私机制在公平性和社会福利上同时达到最优（或对于更困难的数据集族，达到接近最优的小因子近似），表明当人口数据足够自然时，隐私、社会福利和公平性三个目标之间没有额外的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 虽然隐私与社会福利、隐私与公平性之间存在权衡，但当考虑所有三个目标且人口数据足够自然时，不存在额外的权衡，可以在保持差分隐私的同时实现社会福利和公平性的优化。

title: ReContraster: Making Your Posters Stand Out with Regional Contrast
summary: Effective poster design requires rapidly capturing attention and clearly conveying messages. Inspired by the ``contrast effects'' principle, we propose ReContraster, the first training-free model to leverage regional contrast to make posters stand out. By emulating the cognitive behaviors of a poster designer, ReContraster introduces the compositional multi-agent system to identify elements, organize layout, and evaluate generated poster candidates. To further ensure harmonious transitions across region boundaries, ReContraster integrates the hybrid denoising strategy during the diffusion process. We additionally contribute a new benchmark dataset for comprehensive evaluation. Seven quantitative metrics and four user studies confirm its superiority over relevant state-of-the-art methods, producing visually striking and aesthetically appealing posters.

AI.tldr: 提出ReContraster模型，通过区域对比增强海报设计效果，使其在视觉上更突出
AI.motivation: 有效海报设计需要快速吸引注意力并清晰传达信息，受"对比效应"原则启发，需要训练免费的方法来增强海报视觉冲击力
AI.method: 采用组合多智能体系统模拟海报设计师认知行为，识别元素、组织布局、评估候选海报；在扩散过程中集成混合去噪策略确保区域边界和谐过渡
AI.result: 创建了新的基准数据集，通过7个量化指标和4个用户研究证实优于现有方法，能生成视觉冲击力强且美观的海报
AI.conclusion: ReContraster是首个利用区域对比增强海报设计的训练免费模型，通过模拟设计师认知过程和混合去噪策略，能有效生成视觉突出的高质量海报

title: VeriSim: A Configurable Framework for Evaluating Medical AI Under Realistic Patient Noise
summary: Medical large language models (LLMs) achieve impressive performance on standardized benchmarks, yet these evaluations fail to capture the complexity of real clinical encounters where patients exhibit memory gaps, limited health literacy, anxiety, and other communication barriers. We introduce VeriSim, a truth-preserving patient simulation framework that injects controllable, clinically evidence-grounded noise into patient responses while maintaining strict adherence to medical ground truth through a hybrid UMLS-LLM verification mechanism. Our framework operationalizes six noise dimensions derived from peer-reviewed medical communication literature, capturing authentic clinical phenomena such as patient recall limitations, health literacy barriers, and stigma-driven non-disclosure. Experiments across seven open-weight LLMs reveal that all models degrade significantly under realistic patient noise, with diagnostic accuracy dropping 15-25% and conversation length increasing 34-55%. Notably, smaller models (7B) show 40% greater degradation than larger models (70B+), while medical fine-tuning on standard corpora provides limited robustness benefits against patient communication noise. Evaluation by board-certified clinicians demonstrates high-quality simulation with strong inter-annotator agreement (kappa > 0.80), while LLM-as-a-Judge serves as a validated auxiliary evaluator achieving comparable reliability for scalable assessment. Our results highlight a critical Sim-to-Real gap in current medical AI. We release VeriSim as an open-source noise-injection framework, establishing a rigorous testbed for evaluating clinical robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出VeriSim框架，用于在真实患者噪声环境下评估医疗AI模型，解决现有标准化基准无法捕捉临床实际复杂性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗大语言模型在标准化基准上表现优异，但无法反映真实临床环境中患者存在的记忆缺陷、健康素养限制、焦虑等沟通障碍，导致评估结果与临床实际存在显著差距。
AI.method: 开发VeriSim框架，通过混合UMLS-LLM验证机制注入可控的临床证据基础噪声，操作化六个基于医学沟通文献的噪声维度，保持医学真实性的同时模拟患者沟通障碍。
AI.result: 实验显示所有模型在真实患者噪声下性能显著下降：诊断准确率降低15-25%，对话长度增加34-55%；小模型比大模型退化严重40%；医学微调对噪声鲁棒性改善有限；临床专家评估显示高质量模拟。
AI.conclusion: 当前医疗AI存在严重的模拟到真实差距，VeriSim作为开源噪声注入框架为评估临床鲁棒性提供了严格测试平台，揭示了现有评估方法的局限性。

title: PERCEPT-Net: A Perceptual Loss Driven Framework for Reducing MRI Artifact Tissue Confusion
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to Medical Physics. Code available upon request
summary: Purpose: Existing deep learning-based MRI artifact correction models exhibit poor clinical generalization due to inherent artifact-tissue confusion, failing to discriminate artifacts from anatomical structures. To resolve this, we introduce PERCEPT-Net, a framework leveraging dedicated perceptual supervision for structure-preserving artifact suppression. Method: PERCEPT-Net utilizes a residual U-Net backbone integrated with a multi-scale recovery module and dual attention mechanisms to preserve anatomical context and salient features. The core mechanism, Motion Perceptual Loss (MPL), provides artifact-aware supervision by learning generalizable motion artifact representations. This logic directly guides the network to suppress artifacts while maintaining anatomical fidelity. Training utilized a hybrid dataset of real and simulated sequences, followed by prospective validation via objective metrics and expert radiologist assessments. Result: PERCEPT-Net outperformed state-of-the-art methods on clinical data. Ablation analysis established a direct causal link between MPL and performance; its omission caused a significant deterioration in structural consistency (p < 0.001) and tissue contrast (p < 0.001). Radiologist evaluations corroborated these objective metrics, scoring PERCEPT-Net significantly higher in global image quality (median 3 vs. 2, p < 0.001) and verifying the preservation of critical diagnostic structures. Conclusion: By integrating task-specific, artifact-aware perceptual learning, PERCEPT-Net suppresses motion artifacts in clinical MRI without compromising anatomical integrity. This framework improves clinical robustness and provides a verifiable mechanism to mitigate over-smoothing and structural degradation in medical image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出PERCEPT-Net框架，通过感知损失驱动的方法减少MRI运动伪影与组织结构的混淆，实现结构保持的伪影抑制。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习MRI伪影校正模型存在临床泛化能力差的问题，主要原因是伪影与组织结构混淆，无法区分伪影和解剖结构。
AI.method: 使用残差U-Net骨干网络，集成多尺度恢复模块和双重注意力机制，核心是运动感知损失(MPL)提供伪影感知监督，学习可泛化的运动伪影表示。
AI.result: PERCEPT-Net在临床数据上优于现有方法，消融分析显示MPL与性能直接因果关联，放射科医生评估显示全局图像质量显著提高(p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成任务特定、伪影感知的感知学习，PERCEPT-Net能在不损害解剖完整性的情况下抑制临床MRI运动伪影，提高临床鲁棒性。

title: NeuVolEx: Implicit Neural Features for Volume Exploration
summary: Direct volume rendering (DVR) aims to help users identify and examine regions of interest (ROIs) within volumetric data, and feature representations that support effective ROI classification and clustering play a fundamental role in volume exploration. Existing approaches typically rely on either explicit local feature representations or implicit convolutional feature representations learned from raw volumes. However, explicit local feature representations are limited in capturing broader geometric patterns and spatial correlations, while implicit convolutional feature representations do not necessarily ensure robust performance in practice, where user supervision is typically limited. Meanwhile, implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently shown strong promise in DVR for volume compression, owing to their ability to compactly parameterize continuous volumetric fields. In this work, we propose NeuVolEx, a neural volume exploration approach that extends the role of INRs beyond volume compression. Unlike prior compression methods that focus on INR outputs, NeuVolEx leverages feature representations learned during INR training as a robust basis for volume exploration. To better adapt these feature representations to exploration tasks, we augment a base INR with a structural encoder and a multi-task learning scheme that improve spatial coherence for ROI characterization. We validate NeuVolEx on two fundamental volume exploration tasks: image-based transfer function (TF) design and viewpoint recommendation. NeuVolEx enables accurate ROI classification under sparse user supervision for image-based TF design and supports unsupervised clustering to identify compact complementary viewpoints that reveal different ROI clusters. Experiments on diverse volume datasets with varying modalities and ROI complexities demonstrate NeuVolEx improves both effectiveness and usability over prior methods

AI.tldr: 提出NeuVolEx方法，利用隐式神经表示(INR)学习到的特征表示进行体数据探索，支持图像传递函数设计和视点推荐任务。
AI.motivation: 现有体数据探索方法存在局限性：显式局部特征表示难以捕捉更广泛的几何模式和空间相关性，而隐式卷积特征表示在用户监督有限的实际应用中性能不稳定。INR在体数据压缩中表现出色，但其特征表示在探索任务中的潜力尚未充分挖掘。
AI.method: NeuVolEx扩展INR在体数据压缩之外的应用，利用INR训练期间学习的特征表示作为探索基础。通过添加结构编码器和多任务学习方案增强特征表示的空间一致性，支持ROI分类和聚类。
AI.result: 在多种模态和ROI复杂度的体数据集上验证，NeuVolEx在稀疏用户监督下实现准确的ROI分类，支持无监督聚类识别互补视点，在效果和可用性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NeuVolEx成功将INR特征表示应用于体数据探索任务，为图像传递函数设计和视点推荐提供了更有效和可用的解决方案，扩展了INR在体数据可视化中的应用范围。

authors: Rixta A. H. van Eijck van Heslinga
title: Development and evaluation of CADe systems in low-prevalence setting: The RARE25 challenge for early detection of Barrett's neoplasia
comment: The final author list is currently being finalized and will be updated in subsequent versions
summary: Computer-aided detection (CADe) of early neoplasia in Barrett's esophagus is a low-prevalence surveillance problem in which clinically relevant findings are rare. Although many CADe systems report strong performance on balanced or enriched datasets, their behavior under realistic prevalence remains insufficiently characterized. The RARE25 challenge addresses this gap by introducing a large-scale, prevalence-aware benchmark for neoplasia detection. It includes a public training set and a hidden test set reflecting real-world incidence. Methods were evaluated using operating-point-specific metrics emphasizing high sensitivity and accounting for prevalence. Eleven teams from seven countries submitted approaches using diverse architectures, pretraining, ensembling, and calibration strategies. While several methods achieved strong discriminative performance, positive predictive values remained low, highlighting the difficulty of low-prevalence detection and the risk of overestimating clinical utility when prevalence is ignored. All methods relied on fully supervised classification despite the dominance of normal findings, indicating a lack of prevalence-agnostic approaches such as anomaly detection or one-class learning. By releasing a public dataset and a reproducible evaluation framework, RARE25 aims to support the development of CADe systems robust to prevalence shift and suitable for clinical surveillance workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RARE25挑战赛，旨在开发和评估在低患病率环境下用于早期巴雷特食管瘤变检测的计算机辅助检测系统
AI.motivation: 现有CADe系统通常在平衡或富集数据集上表现良好，但在真实低患病率环境下的性能特征不足，存在高估临床实用性的风险
AI.method: RARE25挑战赛建立了一个大规模、考虑患病率的基准测试，包括公开训练集和反映真实世界发病率的隐藏测试集，使用强调高灵敏度并考虑患病率的特定操作点指标进行评估
AI.result: 来自7个国家的11个团队提交了多种方法，虽然一些方法获得了较强的判别性能，但阳性预测值仍然较低，所有方法都依赖完全监督分类，缺乏患病率无关的方法
AI.conclusion: RARE25通过发布公共数据集和可重复评估框架，旨在支持开发对患病率变化具有鲁棒性且适合临床监测工作流程的CADe系统

title: Do Instance Priors Help Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation?
summary: Semantic segmentation requires dense pixel-level annotations, which are costly and time-consuming to acquire. To address this, we present SeSAM, a framework that uses a foundational segmentation model, i.e. Segment Anything Model (SAM), with weak labels, including coarse masks, scribbles, and points. SAM, originally designed for instance-based segmentation, cannot be directly used for semantic segmentation tasks. In this work, we identify specific challenges faced by SAM and determine appropriate components to adapt it for class-based segmentation using weak labels. Specifically, SeSAM decomposes class masks into connected components, samples point prompts along object skeletons, selects SAM masks using weak-label coverage, and iteratively refines labels using pseudo-labels, enabling SAM-generated masks to be effectively used for semantic segmentation. Integrated with a semi-supervised learning framework, SeSAM balances ground-truth labels, SAM-based pseudo-labels, and high-confidence pseudo-labels, significantly improving segmentation quality. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and weak annotation types show that SeSAM consistently outperforms weakly supervised baselines while substantially reducing annotation cost relative to fine supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeSAM框架，利用基础分割模型SAM结合弱标签（粗掩码、涂鸦、点标注）进行弱监督语义分割，解决密集像素级标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 语义分割需要密集的像素级标注，成本高昂且耗时。SAM模型原本设计用于实例分割，不能直接用于语义分割任务。需要探索如何利用弱标签和SAM模型来降低标注成本。
AI.method: SeSAM框架将类别掩码分解为连通组件，沿对象骨架采样点提示，使用弱标签覆盖选择SAM掩码，并通过伪标签迭代优化。结合半监督学习框架，平衡真实标签、SAM生成的伪标签和高置信度伪标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和弱标注类型上的实验表明，SeSAM始终优于弱监督基线方法，同时相对于精细监督显著降低了标注成本。
AI.conclusion: SeSAM框架成功地将SAM模型适配到弱监督语义分割任务中，通过有效的组件设计和迭代优化策略，在保持高质量分割的同时大幅降低了标注成本。

title: Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning
summary: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，用于临床测试选择，其中测试可用性取决于先前结果，导致信息性缺失。
AI.motivation: 临床决策通常涉及选择成本高、侵入性或耗时的测试，需要个性化的序贯策略来决定测量内容和停止时机。由于测试可用性取决于先前结果，导致信息性缺失，需要开发能够处理这种复杂性的学习方法。
AI.method: 在序贯缺失随机机制下，开发了双重稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特定的逆概率权重来考虑异质性测试轨迹，并结合辅助对比模型构建正交伪结果，确保在获取模型或对比模型正确指定时实现无偏策略学习。
AI.result: 建立了阶段对比估计器的oracle不等式、收敛速率、遗憾界限和误分类率。模拟显示该方法在成本调整性能上优于加权和完整案例基线，在前列腺癌队列研究中证明能降低测试成本而不损害预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双重稳健Q学习方法能够有效处理临床测试中的序贯决策问题，在存在信息性缺失的情况下学习成本最优策略，实际应用显示其能显著降低测试成本同时保持预测性能。

title: RADA: Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning for Barely-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Deep learning has greatly advanced medical image segmentation, but its success relies heavily on fully supervised learning, which requires dense annotations that are costly and time-consuming for 3D volumetric scans. Barely-supervised learning reduces annotation burden by using only a few labeled slices per volume. Existing methods typically propagate sparse annotations to unlabeled slices through geometric continuity to generate pseudo-labels, but this strategy lacks semantic understanding, often resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels. Furthermore, medical image segmentation is inherently a pixel-level visual understanding task, where accuracy fundamentally depends on the quality of local, fine-grained visual features. Inspired by this, we propose RADA, a novel Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning pipeline which introduces a dual-encoder framework pre-trained on Alpha-CLIP to extract fine-grained, region-specific visual features from the original images and limited annotations. The framework combines image-level fine-grained visual features with text-level semantic guidance, providing region-aware semantic supervision that bridges image-level semantics and pixel-level segmentation. Integrated into a triple-view training framework, RADA achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse annotation settings on LA2018, KiTS19 and LiTS, demonstrating robust generalization across diverse datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出RADA方法，用于在仅有少量标注切片的医学图像分割任务中，通过区域感知的双编码器辅助学习提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割依赖密集标注，但3D体积扫描标注成本高、耗时长。现有方法通过几何连续性传播稀疏标注生成伪标签，但缺乏语义理解，导致伪标签质量低。医学图像分割本质是像素级视觉理解任务，精度依赖局部细粒度视觉特征质量。
AI.method: 提出RADA区域感知双编码器辅助学习框架，使用基于Alpha-CLIP预训练的双编码器提取细粒度区域特定视觉特征，结合图像级细粒度视觉特征和文本级语义指导，提供区域感知语义监督，桥接图像级语义和像素级分割，集成到三视图训练框架中。
AI.result: 在LA2018、KiTS19和LiTS数据集上，在极稀疏标注设置下实现了最先进的性能，展示了跨不同数据集的强大泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RADA通过区域感知双编码器辅助学习，有效解决了医学图像分割中稀疏标注的挑战，结合细粒度视觉特征和语义指导，显著提升了分割性能，为医学图像分析提供了高效解决方案。

title: Boxes2Pixels: Learning Defect Segmentation from Noisy SAM Masks
comment: Accepted for presentation at the AI4RWC Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Accurate defect segmentation is critical for industrial inspection, yet dense pixel-level annotations are rarely available. A common workaround is to convert inexpensive bounding boxes into pseudo-masks using foundation segmentation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM). However, these pseudo-labels are systematically noisy on industrial surfaces, often hallucinating background structure while missing sparse defects. To address this limitation, a noise-robust box-to-pixel distillation framework, Boxes2Pixels, is proposed that treats SAM as a noisy teacher rather than a source of ground-truth supervision. Bounding boxes are converted into pseudo-masks offline by SAM, and a compact student is trained with (i) a hierarchical decoder over frozen DINOv2 features for semantic stability, (ii) an auxiliary binary localization head to decouple sparse foreground discovery from class prediction, and (iii) a one-sided online self-correction mechanism that relaxes background supervision when the student is confident, targeting teacher false negatives. On a manually annotated wind turbine inspection benchmark, the proposed Boxes2Pixels improves anomaly mIoU by +6.97 and binary IoU by +9.71 over the strongest baseline trained under identical weak supervision. Moreover, online self-correction increases the binary recall by +18.56, while the model employs 80\% fewer trainable parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/CLendering/Boxes2Pixels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Boxes2Pixels的噪声鲁棒性框架，用于从嘈杂的SAM伪掩码中学习缺陷分割，旨在解决工业检测中像素级标注稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业缺陷分割需要密集的像素级标注，但这些标注通常难以获取。虽然可以使用SAM等基础模型将廉价边界框转换为伪掩码，但这些伪标签在工业表面上存在系统性噪声，经常错误地包含背景结构而遗漏稀疏缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Boxes2Pixels框架，将SAM视为噪声教师而非真实监督源。方法包括：(1)使用分层解码器处理冻结的DINOv2特征以获得语义稳定性；(2)辅助二元定位头将稀疏前景发现与类别预测解耦；(3)单边在线自校正机制，在学生模型置信时放松背景监督，针对教师的假阴性错误。
AI.result: 在手动标注的风力涡轮机检测基准上，Boxes2Pixels相比在相同弱监督下训练的最强基线，异常mIoU提高了+6.97，二元IoU提高了+9.71。在线自校正使二元召回率提高了+18.56，同时模型使用了80%更少的可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: Boxes2Pixels框架通过将SAM视为噪声教师而非真实监督源，成功解决了工业缺陷分割中伪标签噪声问题，显著提高了分割性能，同时保持了模型的高效性，为工业检测中的弱监督学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Simulation-Based Method for Testing Collaborative Learning Scaffolds Using LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
comment: submitted to journal of computer aisstant learning
summary: Background: Traditional research on collaborative learning scaffolding is often time-consuming and resource-heavy, which hinders the rapid iteration and optimization of instructional strategies. LLM-based multi-agent systems have recently emerged as a powerful tool to simulate complex social interactions and provide a novel paradigm for educational research. Objectives: This study proposes an LLM-based multi-agent simulation approach to investigate collaborative learning processes and the effectiveness of instructional scaffolds prior to actual classroom deployment. The research specifically examines the feasibility of simulating group discussions and the alignment of these simulations with established learning science theories.
